def positive_cache_key_derived_from_stringified_mutable_object():
    rule_id = "cache_key_derived_from_stringified_mutable_object"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag cache keys built from unstable string forms of mutable objects."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
